title: Average Modpack
description: What I see normally every time when I get a new modpack, so I added a bit more and here we are :)
body:
### This modpack aims to be a average modpack, thats it

This modpack is like a collection of the most common mods I see in other modpacks with a few that I like :D

Description of the most important mods:
Fresh Animations - Gives mobs better animations
Fresh Moves - Gives player better animations
Tree Harvester - Chops down entire trees while holding shift
Vein Miner - Mines entire veins
Terralith - Adds over 100+ biomes and stuff
Incendium - Completely revamps the Nether more than 1.16 did
Nullscape - Completely revamps the End whilst making still feel barren and depressing
Al`s better Creepers, Enderman and Piglins Revamped (compatible with Fresh Animations)
(Almost) No Build Limit - Makes world build limit from -64 - 320 to -1024 - 1024
Zoomify - Adds zoom
Essential - Lets you play with friends in your singleplayer worlds :D
Vanilla Animated Food - Animates the food you eat
Toggle Item Frames - Use shift to make item frames invisible
